---
title: "Organize Data Notebook"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(here)
source(here("utils","check_packages.R"))
source(here("utils","functions.R"))
source(here("simulation","simulation_functions.R"))
```

```{r}
#| label: define-constants

sim_folder = here("data", "data_constructed", "sims")
sheet_id <- "1ad-fJUCjRy_zslI2MMce8UaolepG536-IZr1yNNIuZ8"
googlesheets4::gs4_deauth()
```

```{r}
#| label: functions

organize_sim_pop_data <- function(sim_name) {
  
  sim_folder = here("data", "data_constructed", "sims", sim_name)
  
  if(!dir_exists(sim_folder)) {
     return(NULL)
  }
  
  pop <- read_csv(here(sim_folder, "final_pop.csv"))
  ancestry <- read_csv(here(sim_folder, "ancestry.csv"))
  
  pop <- code_population(pop, ancestry) |>
    mutate(growth = str_split_i(sim_name, "_", 1),
           regime = str_split_i(sim_name, "_", 2))

  return(pop)
}
```


```{r}
#| label: organize-intermarriage-benchmark-data

# even scenario
intermar_even <- get_sim_parameters("even_intermar_benchmark", 
                                    sheet_id)$segments |>
  mutate(year_end = cumsum(segment_length),
         time_period = cut(year_end, breaks = c(0, year_end))) |>
  select(year_end, time_period, lodds12) |>
  rename(exogamy = lodds12)

pop <- read_csv(here(sim_folder, "even_intermar_benchmark", "final_pop.csv"))
mar <- read_csv(here(sim_folder, "even_intermar_benchmark", "final_mar.csv"))
ancestry <- read_csv(here(sim_folder, "even_intermar_benchmark", 
                          "ancestry.csv"))

pop <- code_population(pop, ancestry)
mar <- get_marriages(pop, mar) |>
  mutate(decade_mar = cut(year, breaks = c(0, intermar_even$year_end)))

intermar_even <- calculate_lor(mar) |>
  rename(time_period = decade_mar) |>
  full_join(intermar_even) |>
  mutate(group_share = "even") |>
  select(time_period, group_share, exogamy, lor)

# uneven scenario
intermar_uneven <- get_sim_parameters("uneven_intermar_benchmark", 
                                    sheet_id)$segments |>
  mutate(year_end = cumsum(segment_length),
         time_period = cut(year_end, breaks = c(0, year_end))) |>
  select(year_end, time_period, lodds12) |>
  rename(exogamy = lodds12)

pop <- read_csv(here(sim_folder, "uneven_intermar_benchmark", "final_pop.csv"))
mar <- read_csv(here(sim_folder, "uneven_intermar_benchmark", "final_mar.csv"))
ancestry <- read_csv(here(sim_folder, "uneven_intermar_benchmark", 
                          "ancestry.csv"))

pop <- code_population(pop, ancestry)
mar <- get_marriages(pop, mar) |>
  mutate(decade_mar = cut(year, breaks = c(0, intermar_uneven$year_end)))

intermar <- calculate_lor(mar) |>
  rename(time_period = decade_mar) |>
  full_join(intermar_uneven) |>
  mutate(group_share = "uneven") |>
  select(time_period, group_share, exogamy, lor) |>
  bind_rows(intermar_even) |>
  mutate(lor = ifelse(lor == -Inf, NA, lor))
```

```{r}
#| label: get-all-sims

sim_names <- googlesheets4::sheet_names(sheet_id)
sim_names <- sim_names[!str_detect(sim_names, "IGNORE$") & 
                         !str_detect(sim_names, "benchmark$") &
                         !str_detect(sim_names, "baseline$")]

sims_pop <- map(sim_names, organize_sim_pop_data) |>
  bind_rows() |>
  # for now we will drop the decelerate scenario
  filter(growth != "decelerate")
```


```{r}
#| label: save-data

save(intermar, sims_pop, 
     file = here("data", "data_constructed", "analytical_data.RData"))
```
